name: tech-startups-b2b-software-core
description: Second startup benchmark frame tightened toward company-evaluable prompts that grounded site evidence can answer honestly.

metadata.reason: Reduce grounded refusals caused by category-wide prompts that one company site cannot support

queries.queryText: What does this startup software company appear to help teams do?
What kind of team or buyer seems best suited for this startup software company?
What signals on this company's site suggest enterprise readiness or operational maturity?
What product or workflow differentiators does this startup software company emphasize?
What trust signals does this company provide around customers, adoption, reliability, or scale?
How clearly does this startup software company's site explain the product and target use case?
